title: A Violent Entry
lines: In a fit of panic, you try to kick the simple wooden door off its frame instead of just opening it.
Your foot connects, but instead of the door flying open, your bones shatter as your leg meets the density of infinite matter.
As you fall, the door creaks open on its own, and a blast of superheated desert air incinerates your broken body.

options.desc: Wake up back at the tent
